⚽🇫🇷 Excellent game of football! France delivered a superb performance against a strong Senegal side, securing an impressive 3-1 victory in their FIFA World Cup 2026 group-stage clash.

The goals from Kylian Mbappé and Bradley Barcola for France, along with Ibrahim Mbaye's strike for Senegal, were a joy to watch and added to an entertaining contest. Both teams showcased skill, determination, and attacking intent throughout the match.

Congratulations to France on a well-deserved win, and best wishes to both France 🇫🇷 and Senegal 🇸🇳 for the remainder of their FIFA World Cup 2026 journey! 🌍🏆⚽👏🔥
